snippet.title: Madhosh | Toxic (Hindi) | Rocking Star Yash, Tara Sutaria | Tanishk, Arslan, Faheem, Siddharth, Syed
snippet.description:
Love begins where reason ends... ❤️✨
Yash & Tara bring the magic alive in #Madhosh.

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song: Madhosh
Movie: Toxic
Music: Tanishk Bagchi, Arslan Nizami & Faheem Abdullah
Singer: Siddharth Basrur
Lyricist: Arslan Nizami & Syed Murad Gilani
Music Produced And Arranged by: Tanishk Bagchi
Additional Production: Krishna Kishor & Param Raj
Additional Live Production: Krishna Kishor 
Strings: Budapest Orchestra
Chorus: Chennai Grouping Singing Team
Choir: Elfe Choir
Keys: Rajesh, Navneeth, Melvin 
Session Eng: Lijesh Kumar & Mani Ratnam
Mix & Master: Eric Pillai @Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mix Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth

Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

Lyrics:
Main Saaki Kinaaron Ka 
Bhatka Hoon In Nigaahon Par 
Na Pucho Yun Khaar Hoon
Aur Duniya Se Yun Zaar Zaar Hoon 

Ishq Hain Kya 
Haa Mujhko Bata 
Teri Nazron Se Nazrein Mili  
Kya Badalne Laga Yeh Kaisa Samaa
Haan Andar Hi Andar Se Dil Keh Raha

Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein 

Haan.. Tere Paas Mein 
Tere Saath Se 
Lagta Hain Kuch Khaas Yeh 

(Haan Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein..) ..2 

(Main Aandhi Toofaano Sa 
Seena Chattano Sa 
Jalta Hoon Main Aag Sa) ..2 

Nigaahon Sa Tu 
Junoon Bann Raha 
Mere Dil Pe Tera Yeh Zakhm Laga 
Yeh Kaisi Khalish Rahi Darmiyaan 
Ke Andar Hi Andar Sulagta Raha 

Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein 

Haan.. Tere Paas Mein 
Tere Saath Se 
Lagta Hain Kuch Khaas Yeh 

(Haan.. Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein) ..2 

Chorus…

snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

snippet.title: Yeh Awarapan | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Amaal, Arijit, Rashmi Virag| Awarapan 2
snippet.description:
Saath de raha, hai bas mera….
Yeh Awarapan 🕊️
 
Combining Amaal Mallik’s composition, Rashmi Virag’s lyrics and the arresting voice of Arijit Singh, ‘Yeh Awarapan’ is the second song release from the highly awaited ‘Awarapan 2’. Featuring Emraan Hashmi in the video, the song combines his past and present to show how his constant companion is only his Awarapan ❤️‍🩹
 
#YehAwarapan #ArijitSingh #EmraanHashmi #AmaalMallik #DishaPatani #Awarapan2 
 
Song - Yeh Awarapan
Music - Amaal Mallik
Singers - Arijit Singh
Lyrics - Rashmi Virag
 
Music Team -
Music Produced & Arranged by - Vaibhav Pani & BLUK
Additional Music Production - Rakesh Venkatapuram & Amaal Mallik.
Song Mixed & Mastered by - Pukhraj Sonkar.
Pianos - Vatan Dhuriya.
Electric Guitars - Kalyan Baruah, Ishan Das & Vaibhav Pani.
Acoustic Guitar - Ishan Das
Bass - Saurabh Suman
Drums - Gino Banks
Ishan’s Guitars recorded by -Nishant Pritam Das (Euphony Studios)
Drums & Bass recorded by Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Assisted By - Dileep Nair.
Music Assistants: Mohak Chhabria, Luvdeep Saini, Gaurav Sanghvi, Anvay Patil, Rujul Deolikar.
Amaal Mallik Management: Mourjo Chatterjee.

Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar

यह वीडियो एवं इसमें प्रस्तुत सभी पात्र और घटनाएँ केवल मनोरंजन (Entertainment Purpose) के उद्देश्य से बनाई गई हैं। वीडियो में बच्चों सहित सभी पात्रों का उपयोग केवल कहानी और रचनात्मक प्रस्तुति के संदर्भ में किया गया है।

snippet.title: बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs
snippet.description:
बुधवार स्पेशल | गणेश जी के भजन 2026 | Ganesh Bhajan 2026 | Ganesh Ji Ke Bhajan | Ganesh Songs

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

गणेश जी के रोज नए नए भजन सुनने के लिए हमारे साथ जुड़ें रहे व् नए नए भजनों का आनंद उठाये भजन पसंद आये तो कमेंट में '' जय श्री गणेश " जरुर लिखें || Jai Shree Shyam 🌹🌹

⭐Song :  
मेरे घर भी पधारो देवा
सबसे पहले तुम्हे मनाऊँ 
गणपति गणेश को मेरा प्रणाम
अपने रंग रंगलो गजानन
मेरे लाडले गणेश प्यारे प्यारे
बल बुद्धि के दाता
जन्म-जन्म का साथ है
सुनलो विनती दयानिधान
श्री गणेश जी के 108 नाम
सुखकर्ता दुःखहर्ता आरती
⭐Singer : Sanchit + Upasana mehta 
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

snippet.description:
Song used : https://youtu.be/EEkbgexybzE?si=pogxoCMQJhGTn42X

This video is made for show casing the editing skill of a individual who involved

Presenting : JanaNayagan Final Trailer 

The phase of this video : CM VIJAY's jananayagan 

Edited by : Sivajith MC

Jana Nayagan is an upcoming Indian Tamil-language political action thriller film directed by H. Vinoth and produced by KVN Productions. 

The film stars Vijay, Pooja Hegde, Bobby Deol and Mamitha Baiju, alongside Gautham Vasudev Menon, Prakash Raj, Narain and Priyamani.

 A partial remake of the 2023 Telugu film Bhagavanth Kesari, it was intended to be the final film appearance of Vijay before his transition into politics and the first film to be released after he became the Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu. It is also the first production of KVN Productions in Tamil cinema.

#jananayagan
